summary: Backend regression + mobile-first Expo UI regression executed on public preview. Backend APIs are stable (including species-delete). Core Dyrejagten flows are mostly live after onboarding, but MVP scope still leaks removed compare route and species screen still exposes three-dot menu.

ui_bugs.issue: Tre-prik menu is visible on species screen, but requirement says it should be hidden in this MVP.
Bottom-tab controls are not reliably testable via stable testID selectors (anchor/text-only fallback needed).

integration_issues.issue: Route /compare is still accessible and renders 'Sammenlign', despite user decision to remove comparison screen from MVP.

issues: Primary palette is still strong yellow/red/blue and not clearly nature-green/calm as requested for Dyrejagten tone.

action_items: Hide/remove species three-dot menu in MVP species screen.
Remove compare route from stack/router and prevent direct /compare access.
Align visual theme tokens to calm nature-green profile.
Add explicit testID attributes for bottom tabs and key interactive controls for robust E2E.
Optionally retest match-flow save-to-collection timing with longer async wait in UI automation.
critical_code_review_comments: frontend/app/_layout.tsx still registers compare/save-finding screens, which conflicts with reduced MVP scope.
frontend/lib/api.ts uses EXPO_PUBLIC_BACKEND_URL while platform guideline expects EXPO_BACKEND_URL convention.
Theme tokens in frontend/components/Screen.tsx do not reflect requested nature-green calming style direction.
seed_data_creation: Created deterministic seed user 'natur-e2e-seed-001' with 3 findings (2 same species) via /app/tests/seed_ui_data.py for Dyrebog/species grouping verification.
context_for_next_testing_agent: Onboarding gates Dyrejagten tabs; complete it before asserting bottom navigation labels. Unknown-flow and match-flow both reproducible with image upload. Use seeded user ID to validate grouped species + swipe dots quickly.
rca_of_issue: RCA-1: Compare screen persists because route remains mounted in root Stack and compare.tsx still active. RCA-2: Species three-dot menu is explicitly rendered via rightAction Pressable in species/[slug].tsx, so it can never be hidden under current implementation.
